Our Promise

Why Families Choose Wullar

🌱

Holistic Development

Our curriculum nurtures cognitive, social, emotional, and physical growth through structured play and guided activities.

🔒

Safe & Secure

Monitored premises, trained safety staff, and regular emergency drills keep your child safe every day.

👩‍🏫

Qualified Educators

All our caregivers hold ECE certifications with ongoing professional development and training.

🥗

Nutritious Meals

Fresh, balanced, age-appropriate meals prepared daily by our certified in-house nutritionist.

🎨

Rich Activity Calendar

Art, music, yoga, STEM, outdoor play, cultural events, and Kashmiri heritage activities every month.

🏆

Award-Winning Students

Our students excel in district-level sports, cultural competitions, and academic achievements.

Life at Wullar

Moments That Matter

From cultural celebrations to sports victories, every day at Wullar is a memory in the making.

What We Offer

Our Programmes

Thoughtfully designed age-appropriate programmes for every stage of your child's early learning journey.

🍼

Infant Care

6 – 12 months

Gentle, nurturing care with sensory exploration, tummy time, and responsive caregiving.

Learn more →
🧸

Toddler World

1 – 3 years

Language-rich activities, motor skill building, and social play in a safe exploration space.

Learn more →
🎨

Preschool Plus

3 – 5 years

School readiness, early literacy, numeracy, and creative arts in a joyful classroom setting.

Learn more →
🚀

Kindergarten Prep

5 – 6 years

Advanced literacy, STEM foundations, and confidence-building for a smooth school transition.

Learn more →

What We Teach

Programmes & Courses

Structured, play-based learning pathways designed by ECE experts for every developmental stage.

🍼
Infant6–12 months

Infant Foundations

Responsive caregiving, sensory stimulation, tummy time, and early attachment routines.

⏱ Full/Half Day👶 1:3 ratio
🧸
Toddler1–2 years

Tiny Explorers

First words, first steps, first friendships. Language development, gross motor play, safe social interaction.

⏱ Half Day👶 1:4 ratio
🎨
Toddler+2–3 years

Creative Cubs

Art, music, storytelling, and imaginative play designed to ignite creativity and emotional expression.

⏱ Half/Full Day👶 1:5 ratio
🌍
Preschool3–4 years

World Wonders

Nature exploration, early science, cultural awareness including Kashmiri heritage through project-based learning.

⏱ Full Day👶 1:8 ratio
📚
Preschool Plus4–5 years

Literacy Launch

Phonics, early reading, writing readiness, and numeracy using the Jolly Phonics and Montessori frameworks.

⏱ Full Day👶 1:10 ratio
🚀
Kindergarten5–6 years

Kindergarten Prep

Advanced literacy, STEM introduction, critical thinking, and school-readiness skills for a confident primary school transition.

⏱ Full Day👶 1:12 ratio
🎵
EnrichmentAll Ages

Music & Movement

Rhythm, dance, Kashmiri folk music, and movement games that build brain connections and coordination.

⏱ 3×/week👶 All Groups
🔬
STEM3–6 years

Little Scientists

Hands-on experiments, building blocks, coding games, and problem-solving activities to spark scientific curiosity.

⏱ 2×/week👶 Age 3+
🥋
SportsAll Ages

Ju-Jitsu & Sports

District-level championship-winning programme. Our students have excelled at the Ju-Jitsu Association of Bandipora competitions.

⏱ 3×/week👶 Age 4+
Our Team

Meet Our Dedicated Faculty

Passionate early childhood educators committed to every child's unique growth and happiness.

Leadership

Centre Leadership

👩‍💼

Dr. Rukhsana Bhat

Founder & Centre Director

With over 20 years in early childhood education, Dr. Bhat founded Wullar Child Care in Ward 3, Plan Bandipora with a vision to bring world-class early learning to Kashmir. She leads with warmth, expertise, and an unshakable belief that every child deserves the best education.

Academic Coordinator

Join Our Family

Admissions 2025–26

We welcome children aged 6 months to 6 years. Ward 3, Plan Bandipora · Call 8494066850

How to Enrol Your Child

We believe every child deserves the best start. Our admissions process is designed to be smooth and welcoming for your whole family.

  • 1
    Submit Enquiry FormFill out the form or call 8494066850. We'll respond within 24 hours to schedule your visit.
  • 2
    Schedule a Campus VisitTour our facilities at Ward 3, Plan Bandipora, meet our teachers, and see programmes in action.
  • 3
    Submit Application & DocumentsComplete the formal application and provide required documents listed below.
  • 4
    Orientation & WelcomeAttend our Family Orientation Day where your child meets their teacher and gets familiar with their new environment.
  • 5
    First Day at Wullar! 🎉Your child begins their Wullar journey — cared for, challenged, and celebrated every single day.

📋 Documents Required

  • Child's Birth Certificate (original + photocopy)
  • Child's latest passport-size photographs (4 copies)
  • Immunization / vaccination record
  • Parent/Guardian photo ID (Aadhaar / Passport)
  • Proof of Address
  • Emergency contact details form
  • Medical history / allergy declaration form

💰 Fee Structure 2025–26

ProgrammeTypeMonthly
Infant CareFull Day₹6,500
Tiny ExplorersHalf Day₹4,200
Creative CubsHalf/Full₹4,800
Preschool PlusFull Day₹5,500
Kindergarten PrepFull Day₹6,000

*Registration fee: ₹1,500 (one-time). Sibling discount: 10%.
